steps.title: Locate each person’s role
steps.content: Hayes made early contributions to US cryptology and worked as a cryptanalyst. The text then says Hayes and others helped make it possible for more women, including Markova, to enter cryptology; Markova works in and teaches digital cryptography.

steps.title: Eliminate unsupported claims
steps.content: Choice B misreads the reference to the history of cryptology as saying both worked in history. Choice C invents an argument about schools. Choice D invents organizations founded by both women. The similarity supported by the text is that both contributed to cryptology. The answer is A.
